shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-tooltip clickable tooltip pointer leaves anchor tooltip stays open" --space default --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc "git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js && nl -ba src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx | sed -n '420,455p' && nl -ba src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js | sed -n '105,138p'"

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "In react-tooltip clickable mode, the tooltip must track direct mouseenter/mouseleave on its own element and cancel the pending hide timer on mouseenter. The anchor schedules a delayed hide when left; only setting a hovering ref was timing-sensitive and could allow the close timer to win before interactive content was reachable. Regression coverage advances the 100ms delay and asserts the react-tooltip__show class." -t "Clickable tooltip hover suppresses delayed close" --unit-type learning -l react-tooltip -s codex -i 0.8'
